title: `VM does not exist` error with ssh command on applehv podman machine
body:
### Issue Description

There is a bug in fix PR https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21114  and running `podman machine ssh <command>` results in an error.

I commented on the related Issue https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/21090 .

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
(Podman machine is pre-created)
1. `git clone https://github.com/containers/podman.git`
2. `make podman-remote`
3.  Run `podman machine ssh <command>`

```
% bin/darwin/podman machine ssh date
Error: ls: VM does not exist
% bin/darwin/podman machine ssh podman-machine-default date
Sat Jan  6 22:47:47 JST 2024
```

### Describe the results you received

```
% bin/darwin/podman machine ssh date
Error: ls: VM does not exist
```

### Describe the results you expected

```
% bin/darwin/podman machine ssh date
Sat Jan  6 22:47:47 JST 2024
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
The pattern for `arg[0]` is as follows.
| no  | `arg[0]`                 | Podman machine         | `validVM` | `err`               | Comments   | 
| --- | ---------------------- | ---------------------- | ------- | ----------------- | ---------- | 
| 1   | N/A                    | podman-machine-default | true    | `<nil>`             |            | 
| 2   | podman-machine-default | podman-machine-default | true    | `<nil>`             |            | 
| 3   | Command                | podman-machine-default | false   | VM does not exist | This issue | 
| 4   | other VM's name        | other VM               | true    | `<nil>`             |            | 

I am not sure if this is correct, but by removing the following part of the code, the problem will be solved.
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/de797e572404bce3a85b91686b75376a3af117c2/cmd/podman/machine/ssh.go#L61-L63
Care to open a PR to fix?
